title: Day in the Life - May 1
excerpt: When I awoke at an hour I shouldn't have, I saw on both Ali's and Elise's Instagram feeds that they were doing #dayinthelife . Decided it would be fun to join in. Here is how my day in Perth played…
body: When I awoke at an hour I shouldn't have, I saw on both Ali's and Elise's Instagram feeds that they were doing #dayinthelife. Decided it would be fun to join in. Here is how my day in Perth played out.3:00am - woke up and could not go back to sleep. Decided to stay in bed and get some work done. 7:44am - breakfast in bed | also thankful to have fallen back asleep for a few hours. 8:17am - made some fancy coffee. (Yes, my doctor says I can have a cup a day - just not to exceed 200mg of caffeine a day)8:35am - off to Spotlight with driver extraordinaire Eva Daly8:40am - on our way to Joondalup. (Spotlight store visit not photographed on my iPhone, but on my camera.)
